name.ja: <ruby>朽<rt>く</rt></ruby>ちた<ruby>祭<rt>さい</rt></ruby><ruby>儀<rt>ぎ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt>よう</rt></ruby><ruby>録<rt>ろく</rt></ruby>

text.en: Reveal 1 Ritual Spell in your hand or Deck, and add 1 monster that mentions it from your Deck to your hand. If a face-up Ritual Monster(s) you control leaves the field by card effect while this card is in your GY, and you control no face-up non-Ritual Monsters (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Corrupted Ritual Records" once per turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①②效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：从手牌・牌组将1张仪式魔法卡出示给对手，从牌组将1只记载有该卡名的怪兽加入手牌。②：此卡存在于墓地的状态下，自己场上有表侧表示的仪式怪兽因效果从场上离开的情况下，如果自己场上不存在仪式怪兽以外的表侧表示怪兽则可以发动。将此卡加入手牌。
